# Repo map (auto-generated — `bash scripts/genmap.sh`; do not hand-edit)

Per-file index of section banners (`// ===== / // -----`) and top-level `function`s,
with line numbers. Grep/jump here instead of reading whole files. See CLAUDE.md for architecture.

```
  (no banners/functions)
```
